title: claoxylon neoebudicum
intro: Claoxylon neoebudicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the Pacific island of Vanuatu. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever and respiratory issues. Claoxylon neoebudicum can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, to harness its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
